(CUM).description: Compiler uncertain if cumulative Application of the code 'CUM' uncertain. Explanation is obligatory. To be used only with process codes 'F' or 'X'

(M).description: Uncertain if formation via isomeric trans. included Whether formation via isomeric transition is included is regarded by the compiler as uncertain. Explanation is obligatory.

(SEC).description: Compiler uncertain if secondary (for fission product yields)

20.description: 0th component of the 2nd rank spherical tensor

21.description: 1st component of the 2nd rank spherical tensor

22.description: 2nd component of the 2nd rank spherical tensor

31.description: 1st component of the 3rd rank spherical tensor

32.description: 2nd component of the 3rd rank spherical tensor

33.description: 3rd component of the 3rd rank spherical tensor

40.description: 0th component of the 4th rank spherical tensor

CON.description: For a range of continuum gammas excl. discrete gammas

CRN.description: More than two fragments are specified To be used when more than two atomic and/or mass numbers are specified under headings ELEM1, MASS1 etc.

CUM.description: Cumulative production of product nucleus (Cumulative) Production of the product nucleus via direct formation and radioactive decay. To be used only with process codes 'F' or 'X'.

DIS.description: For a range of discrete gammas excl. continuum gammas

EM.description: Emission cross section (excluding elastic scattering) the incident particle

EP.description: For a given electric polarity component

ICL.description: Uncorrected for other channels emitting same particle

IND.description: Independent production of product nucleus (Independent) Production of the product nucleus via direct formation only. To be used only with process codes 'F' or 'X' and only in cases where cumulative production (SF5 = CUM) can occur also.

ISP.description: Partial with respect to level of intermediate products

LL.description: Longitudinal-longitudinal (zz) component Beam and target spins parallel to beam direction in scattering plane (=zz)

LP.description: For longitudinal component of linear momentum

MP.description: For a given magnetic polarity component

NN.description: Normal-normal (yy) component Beam and target spins normal to scattering plane (=yy)

PAR.description: Partial leaving the residual nucleus in a specific level or emitting a specific gamma or particle group.

SEQ.description: Particle sequence as specified in SF3 Indicates that the sequence of outgoing particles is as specified in subfield 3.

SL.description: Sideward-longitudinal (xz) component Beam spin perpendicular, target spin parallel to beam direction in scattering plane

SS.description: Sideward-sideward (xx) component Target and beam spins perpendicular to beam direction in scattering plane

TP.description: For transverse component of linear momentum

UNW.description: Unweighted production cross section not weighted by multiplicity of outgoing particle
